Package com.stripe.model.v2.commerce

package com.stripe.model.v2.commerce
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    com.stripe.model.v2
     
    com.stripe.model.v2.billing
     
    com.stripe.model.v2.core
     
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    ProductCatalogImport
    The ProductCatalogImport object tracks the long-running background process that handles uploading, processing and validation.
    ProductCatalogImport.StatusDetails
    Details about the current import status.
    ProductCatalogImport.StatusDetails.AwaitingUpload
    Details when the import is awaiting file upload.
    ProductCatalogImport.StatusDetails.AwaitingUpload.UploadUrl
    The pre-signed URL information for uploading the catalog file.
    ProductCatalogImport.StatusDetails.Failed
    Details when the import didn't complete.
    ProductCatalogImport.StatusDetails.Processing
    Details when the import is processing.
    ProductCatalogImport.StatusDetails.Succeeded
    Details when the import has succeeded.
    ProductCatalogImport.StatusDetails.SucceededWithErrors
    Details when the import completed but some records failed to process.
    ProductCatalogImport.StatusDetails.SucceededWithErrors.ErrorFile
    A file containing details about all errors that occurred.
    ProductCatalogImport.StatusDetails.SucceededWithErrors.ErrorFile.DownloadUrl
    The pre-signed URL information for downloading the error file.
    ProductCatalogImport.StatusDetails.SucceededWithErrors.Sample
    For more details about Sample, please refer to the API Reference.
